message:
feat(widgets): extend Input, List, and LogViewer capabilities

Enhanced widget functionality across three core components:

Input widget (input.rs, +208 lines):
- Selection range support (shift+arrow keys)
- Clipboard integration (copy/cut/paste)
- Undo/redo stack integration
- Input masking for passwords
- Placeholder text support
- Multi-line input mode
- Configurable key bindings

List widget (list.rs, +110 lines):
- Multi-select mode with Ctrl+click
- Range selection with Shift+click
- Keyboard multi-select (Ctrl+Space)
- Selection change callbacks
- Drag-to-select support
- Virtualized rendering for large lists

LogViewer widget (log_viewer.rs, +612 lines):
- Real-time log streaming with backpressure
- Log level filtering (error/warn/info/debug/trace)
- Text search with highlighting
- Timestamp formatting options
- Auto-scroll with scroll-lock toggle
- Copy-to-clipboard for log entries
- Configurable buffer size limits
- ANSI color preservation

All widgets updated to use new theme token system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
